demand-signal
*************


Description
===========

Use the OCI Control Center Demand Signal CLI to manage Demand Signals.


Available Commands
==================

* occ-demand-signal

  * change-compartment

  * create

  * delete

  * get

  * occ-demand-signal-collection

    * list-occ-demand-signals

  * patch

  * update

* occ-metric-alarm

  * create

  * create-occ-metric-alarm-compute-resource-configuration

  * create-occ-metric-alarm-exadata-resource-configuration

  * create-occ-metric-alarm-network-resource-configuration

  * create-occ-metric-alarm-storage-resource-configuration

  * delete

  * get

  * occ-metric-alarm-collection

    * list-occ-metric-alarms

  * update
